title: Online Store
description: Sell products online with a shopping cart, product pages, and checkout
longDescription: A full-featured online store where customers can browse products, add items to their cart, and check out. Includes product catalog, shopping cart, and a clean modern design.

questions.question: What products or services are you selling?
questions.placeholder: I sell handmade ceramic mugs and pottery...
questions.hint: Describe what you sell — this helps us design the right product pages.

questions.question: What's your business or store called?
Any special features you need?
questions.placeholder: Size variants, gift wrapping option, newsletter signup...
questions.hint: Optional — leave blank if you're not sure yet.

styleOptions.title: Clean & Minimal
styleOptions.description: White space, subtle shadows, neutral palette with one accent color. Scandinavian-inspired.

styleOptions.title: Bold & Modern
styleOptions.description: Dark backgrounds, vibrant gradients, large typography. Makes a strong impression.

styleOptions.title: Warm & Cozy
styleOptions.description: Earthy tones, soft rounded corners, serif headings. Feels handmade and personal.

styleOptions.title: Classic & Trustworthy
styleOptions.description: Traditional layout, navy and gold accents, professional typography. Builds trust.

features: Product catalog with images and descriptions
systemPromptHint: You are building an online store. Use Astro with Tailwind CSS. Keep the code clean and well-organized. The store should have a home page with featured products, individual product pages, a cart system using localStorage, a checkout summary page, an about page, and a contact page with a form.
